reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Clicked on "QA-20260520-203357-cpx2" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened
Verified agent status is "idle" — Confirmed status shown in top right of page

Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message submitted, agent transitioned to "working" status, session created with name "GitHub Identity Verification Request"
Waited for GitHub access request card — Card appeared asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up your username?" with GitHub account already checked
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant access — Card dismissed, agent continued processing with status "working"
Permission dialog appeared asking about API scope for "GET /user" — Multiple options shown for permission level
Selected "Always allow read:user" option — Granted appropriate read-only scope for user profile data
Waited for agent response — Agent completed processing after 24 seconds, returned to "idle" status
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took final screenshot showing response — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with all tool executions and the final username response
